concerns.text: T033 'Documentation updates' lacks a concrete deliverable. The spec (SC-002) requires explicit framing of findings (associational vs. causal). Task must specify: 'Generate results/statistical_framing.md containing the inference type declaration based on dataset randomization status'.

T029 mentions 'sensitivity analysis sweeps' but does not name the required output artifact. Spec SC-005 mandates a 'sensitivity report'. Task must be: 'Implement src/analysis/stats.py to generate results/sensitivity_report.csv documenting metric significance across motion/effect thresholds'.

T027-T032 cover stats and viz but miss the artifact for SC-004 (power analysis). Task must be added: 'Generate results/power_analysis.md documenting sample size (n≥20) and power limitations as required by SC-004'.

T007 creates a 'skeleton' for quality_check.py. The spec (Edge Cases) requires active exclusion logic based on FD > 0.5mm. A skeleton is not executable for the downstream implementer to satisfy the exclusion requirement. Task must be: 'Implement src/data/quality_check.py to compute FD from JSON sidecars and exclude subjects with >10% high-motion volumes'.

T008 mentions 'checkpointing logic' but lacks the specific deliverable for the 6-hour limit and disk overflow scenarios required by Edge Cases. Task must be: 'Implement main.py checkpointing to save state at each subject completion and support resumption from last completed stage on timeout/disk overflow'.

T003 configures linting/formatting. While good practice, this is scope creep relative to the research outcome (FR-010 only requires reproducible scripts). This is a 'writing' class issue as it can be split/removed by the atomizer without breaking the core research pipeline.
